forWrappers.doc: Open the menu whose id is `for`
Open the dialog whose id is `for`
Open the fab-menu whose id is `for`
Toggle the nav-rail whose id is `for`
Toggle the drawer whose id is `for`
Toggle the datepicker whose id is `for`

nullaryWrappers.doc: Move the enclosing stepper to the previous step

tocIgnore.description: Exclude this heading from the table of contents generated by an `m3e-toc` component. `m3e-toc-ignore` is a valueless presence marker the `m3e-toc` reads from heading elements; it is not an `m3e-heading` CEM attribute, so it is injected here as a heading-scoped synthetic capability.

_coerce.name: asButton
_coerce._comment: WS6/CX5: A Chip admitted as a button-kinded element. Loud crossing — never automatic. M3e.Chip.view produces { chip : M3e.Kind.Brand }; SplitButton.leadingButton requires { button : M3e.Kind.Brand }. Use M3e.Coerce.asButton to explicitly admit a Chip into a button slot.
